touches.ai_summary: Cold outreach email sent to Jack Schulz introducing our AI meeting assistant platform and highlighting rep productivity gains. No response received.
LinkedIn connection request sent to Jack Schulz with personalized note about sales team efficiency challenges. No response received.
Follow-up LinkedIn message sharing case study of similar professional services firm improving rep productivity by 40%. No response received.
Follow-up email checking in on previous outreach. Jack responded expressing interest in learning more about how we compare to Fireflies, which his team is currently evaluating.

questions_asked.question: How does your solution differ from Fireflies?
questions_asked.answer: Explained our unlimited automation capabilities and deeper CRM integration vs Fireflies' more basic transcription focus

next_steps: Schedule discovery call for next week

touches.ai_summary: Cold email sent with competitive comparison sheet highlighting automation features. No response received.
Cold email with ROI calculator for 10-seat deployment. Jack responded asking about pricing and availability for a demo call this week.

questions_asked.question: What's the typical investment for a team our size?
questions_asked.answer: Shared pricing range of $8K-12K ACV for 10 seats depending on tier and commitment

next_steps: Send calendar invite for discovery call

touches.ai_summary: Discovery call with Jack to understand current sales process and pain points. Jack shared frustration with manual note-taking reducing actual selling time. Currently using Fireflies for basic transcription but wants more automation. Team of 10 reps needs better pipeline visibility.

questions_asked.question: What's your current process for capturing meeting notes and updating your CRM?
questions_asked.answer: Reps manually take notes during calls, then spend 10-15 min after each call updating Salesforce. Very time-consuming.

questions_asked.question: What's driving you to look at alternatives to Fireflies?
questions_asked.answer: Fireflies gives us transcripts but we still have to manually extract action items and update CRM fields. Need more automation.

questions_asked.question: Can your platform automatically update opportunity fields in Salesforce?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, our unlimited automation tier can map meeting insights directly to any CRM field with custom rules

next_steps: Send demo video showing CRM automation
Schedule product demo for next week

touches.ai_summary: Product demo call walking through automated CRM updates, call analytics, and deal intelligence features. Jack was engaged and liked the automation capabilities. Concerned about getting team adoption and mentioned budget approval process.

questions_asked.question: How long does implementation typically take for a team of 10?
questions_asked.answer: Usually 1-2 weeks for full deployment including training and CRM integration setup

questions_asked.question: Who else would need to be involved in evaluating this decision?
questions_asked.answer: Jack mentioned he has budget authority for sales tools and would handle the decision internally

questions_asked.question: What kind of reporting do you offer for sales leadership?
questions_asked.answer: Demonstrated executive dashboards showing rep activity, deal velocity, and conversation analytics

objections: Fireflies is significantly cheaper and the team is already familiar with it
next_steps: Share customer references from professional services firms

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email with formal proposal for 10 seats at $10,200 ACV (unlimited automation tier). Included ROI analysis and customer case studies. Jack responded asking if there's flexibility on pricing given they're comparing to Fireflies.

questions_asked.question: Is there any room for negotiation on the price?
questions_asked.answer: Mentioned we can discuss pricing on our next call and explore options based on contract length

next_steps: Schedule exec meeting to discuss terms

touches.ai_summary: Exec-level discussion with Jack about business case and pricing. Jack confirmed strong interest but pushed back on pricing compared to Fireflies. Discussed value of automation vs basic transcription. Jack focused heavily on cost justification.

questions_asked.question: Can you help me build the internal business case around the price difference?
questions_asked.answer: Walked through time savings calculation: 10 reps saving 1 hour/day = 50 hours/week recovered for selling

questions_asked.question: What would make this a no-brainer decision for you?
questions_asked.answer: Jack said getting closer to Fireflies pricing would make it an easy yes, ideally under $7K

objections: Fireflies is about 60% cheaper for similar team size
Hard to justify 3x price difference to finance team
next_steps: Schedule follow-up to present revised proposal

touches.ai_summary: Exec meeting rescheduled from original time. Discussed revised pricing proposal at $6,800 ACV (33% discount) to close the gap with Fireflies while maintaining unlimited automation. Jack receptive but wants to review internally before committing. Still no other stakeholders engaged.

questions_asked.question: Would it be helpful to bring in your CFO or VP of Sales to discuss the investment?
questions_asked.answer: Jack said he has authority to approve this level of spend and prefers to keep it streamlined

questions_asked.question: What's included in onboarding and support at this price point?
questions_asked.answer: Confirmed dedicated CSM, full implementation support, and ongoing training included

questions_asked.question: What's your timeline for making a decision?
questions_asked.answer: Jack wants to finalize by end of quarter, about 2 weeks out

next_steps: Jack to review with team and respond by end of week

touches.ai_summary: Negotiation call to finalize contract terms. Jack confirmed team is aligned on moving forward at $6,800 pricing. Discussed contract length (annual), payment terms (annual prepay), and implementation timeline. Jack committed to verbal approval pending legal review.

questions_asked.question: Can we do quarterly payments instead of annual prepay?
questions_asked.answer: Explained annual prepay is required for the discounted rate, but can explore quarterly for future renewals

questions_asked.question: Any concerns from your team about switching from Fireflies?
questions_asked.answer: Jack said team is excited about the automation features and willing to make the change

questions_asked.question: What does the cancellation policy look like?
questions_asked.answer: Reviewed standard terms: annual commitment with 60-day notice for non-renewal

objections: Annual prepayment is tight on cash flow, would prefer quarterly
next_steps: Send final contract for legal review
Target signature by end of next week

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email with final contract sent to Jack for signature. Confirmed $6,800 ACV, 10 seats, unlimited automation tier, annual prepay. Included implementation timeline and CSM introduction. Jack acknowledged receipt and said legal is reviewing.

questions_asked.question: How quickly can we start onboarding after signature?
questions_asked.answer: Confirmed we can kick off implementation within 48 hours of signed contract

next_steps: Follow up mid-week on signature status
